title: SOS Suicide Crisis Intervention Programme
text:
SOS Suicide Crisis Intervention Programme - SupportGoWhere
SOS Suicide Crisis Intervention Programme
Share link
Provides confidential emotional support to individuals facing a crisis, thinking about suicide or affected by suicide through helpline, face to face in-person, and other support services.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based, Helpline
Free
Referral not required
HELPLINE
1767
Open 24 hours
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

SOS Suicide Crisis Intervention Programme comprises:

24-hour helpline

CAREmail

Care Text

Intervention call

Specialist counselling and grief counselling

Support group for attempters/high risk cases

Referrals




SOS also serves individuals referred from community partners (i.e. police, hospitals, SSAs) or concerned third party.

Who is this for?

Persons at risk of suicide

What to expect?

Clients can access SOS Hotline calling 1767, a 24-hour hotline manned by trained volunteers and supported by professional staff.  Depending on need, clients may be encouraged to seek immediate support from the hospitals, psychiatrists, therapists, counsellors and community services or encouraged to see a counsellor at SOS.

How to apply?

Reach out to SOS via 24/7 hotline: 1767; CAREmail: pat@sos.org.sg; and Care Text : WhatsApp 9151 1767.

Information last updated on 23 Sep 2025
